ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld endgame mod built around controlled summoning, infernal-tech progression, hostile ritual encounters, and boss-oriented reward escalation.
Current local development state: v0.6.0-alpha.
Abyssal Protocol is no longer just a first vertical slice. The current project build already includes a broader alpha-stage gameplay foundation with: - Abyssal Summoning Circle, Abyssal Forge, compact tabs, and full custom consoles - summon infrastructure, sigil handling, Sigil Vault storage, circle modules, capacitors, and instability systems - hostile abyssal encounter content built around portals, manifestations, ritual escalation, and boss summon flow - Archon Beast progression plus additional implemented hostile content such as Hexgun Thrall, Ember Hound, Chain Zealot, Rift Sniper, Null Priest, Warden of Ash, Choir Engine, and Reactor Saint - custom weapons, projectiles, implants, crown/Herald-side systems, VFX, sounds, patches, and EN/RU localization
Abyssal Protocol is not meant to be just another strong faction or a generic demon pack. The goal is a deliberate infernal-tech loop: build forbidden infrastructure, prepare ritual access, trigger controlled hostile encounters, survive them, and convert the rewards into deeper progression.
The mod is still in active alpha-stage expansion. Broader balancing, content hardening, additional progression layers, and later-game escalation are still being developed.
